name: Edward
history: Ongoing workplace difficulties involving underappreciation and lack of support. Repeated experiences of ideas and suggestions not being accepted.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't stand up for myself, people will walk all over me.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I don't fight back, I'll be seen as weak and worthless.
coping_strategies: Engaging in physical fights to assert dominance and avoid feeling vulnerable.
situation: A workplace discussion about culture and atmosphere conflicted with a client meeting scheduled by the mentor.
auto_thought: If I don't assert myself, I'll be ignored and undervalued.
behavior: Engaging in confrontations and physical fights to assert control.
